articles.title: Relief Society Conference Julia A. F. Lund
articles.author: Julia A. F. Lund
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 622-625, but the article listed on page 633 is not visible in these images. The images contain lesson department content about child development and theology/testimony topics, but do not include the Relief Society Conference article by Julia A. F. Lund.

articles.title: "Sweet Are the Uses of Adversity" Vernessa M. Nagle
articles.author: Vernessa M. Nagle
articles.notes: The provided PDF images (pages 714-717) contain only advertisements and the magazine's table of contents/publication information. The article "Sweet Are the Uses of Adversity" by Vernessa M. Nagle, which should appear on page 697 according to the table of contents, is not present in these particular PDF page images.
